title: 8 cone passing pattern
summary: A basic group passing pattern for working on back foot receiving, and follow-your-pass flow;
pitchSize: ~25 by 40 yd space (can vary for passing length you’re training….too small is hard)
setupHtml: Set up 8 cones as shown in diagram; one player per cone, then add’l player on starting cone behind each ball used
instructionsHtml: 1) Player with ball passes to next cone, aiming for back foot of teammate; Follow your pass
progressionsHtml: start with one ball but can incorporate two balls (need cones+X for X balls, e.g., 9 players to do one ball, 10 for two)
